app.title: Steam MP Game Finder
app.tagline: Find multiplayer games you all own.

friends.title: Select friends
friends.manyWarning: Many friends selected — comparison may take a while.
friends.privacyHint: Game libraries must be public (Profile → Edit → Game details: Public).
friends.noFriends: No friends loaded. Add profiles via URL.

loading.title: Loading your friends
loading.progressProfiles: {total, plural, one {# friend} other {# friends}} total
loading.tip0: Steam counts games you only own for the badge, too.
loading.tip1: We promise not to judge your 400 hours in a single-player game.
loading.tip2: Public libraries are the key. Private is fine — just not comparable.
loading.tip3: The server is politely asking Valve for your friends' libraries.
loading.tip4: One more friend… one more friend…
loading.tip5: Fun fact: "Never played" still counts as owned.
loading.tip6: Soon you'll see who hoards the most unplayed multiplayer games.
loading.tip7: The Valve API is on it — sometimes in slow motion.
loading.tip8: We sort by name, not by skill.
loading.tip9: Almost there. Then you can blame each other for what to buy.

results.title: Shared games
results.emptyHint: Adjust filters or check library visibility settings.
results.matchNearHint: On each card one person is marked who doesn't own the game. Comparison may take longer.
results.emptyBuyerFilter: {name} wouldn't need to buy any of these near matches.

storeModal.widgetLoadError: Could not load the store widget.

results.emptyTagFilter: No games match the selected categories.

landing.signInPrompt: Sign in with Steam to load your friend list and find shared multiplayer games.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
